info.name: Mailcow Password Sync
info.summary: Synchronizes user passwords to Mailcow mail server
info.description:
When a user changes their password in Nextcloud, this app automatically updates the corresponding mailbox password in Mailcow via its API.
Mapping: Nextcloud username → username@najmuje.eu in Mailcow.
info.author: Banner Digital sp. z o.o.
